use_cases: Display user profile pictures in navigation headers and user menus
Show user avatars alongside comments, reviews, or activity feeds
Represent team members or collaborators in dashboard interfaces
Provide fallback initials when profile images fail to load
Create avatar stacks or groups for displaying multiple users
ai_summary: A lightweight, accessible avatar component built on Radix UI primitives featuring image display with automatic fallback to initials or placeholder text when images fail to load. Uses standard Tailwind sizing with rounded-full styling, designed as a foundational building block for user identity displays across any interface.
